The patients in both groups received health education. Additionally, in the EA group, EA was performed at the acupoints such as Neixiyan (EX-LE4), Dubi (ST35), Heding (EX-LE2) and Xuehai (SP10) on the affected side, with dense-disperse wave, at the frequency of 2 Hz/100 Hz and the electric current of 1 mA to 2 mA, it was operated for 30 min in each session, once daily, 6 sessions a week, and for 4 consecutive weeks. In the sham-EA group, sham-EA was operated at the same acupoints as the EA group, with the same duration of interventions, but without electric stimulation exerted. In the baseline (week 0), and week 2, 4, 8 and 16, the score on numerical rating scale (NRS) for pain at rest and during activity, as well as pressure pain thresholds (PPTs) at the local and distal of knee joint were observed in the two groups separately. In week 0, 4, and 16, the Western Ontario and McMaster universities osteoarthritis index (WOMAC) and the 12-item short form health survey (SF-12) were scored. In week 0 and 4, the score on central sensitization inventory (CSI) and the levels of serum biomarkers related to central sensitization, such as glutamate (Glu), glutamine (Gln), substance P (SP), and calcitonin gene-related peptide (CGRP) were observed in the two groups.
Compared with the baseline, the EA group showed the decrease in NRS scores at rest and during activity in week 2, 4, 8, and 16, in the scores on subscales and the total score of WOMAC in week 4 and 16, as well as in CSI score and serum levels of Glu, Gln, SP, and CGRP in week 4 (P<0.05); and presented higher PPTs at the local and distal knee joint in week 2, 4, 8 and 16 and the scores on physical and mental health of SF-12 in weeks 4 and 16 (P<0.05). The sham-EA group presented the reduced resting-related NRS scores in week 2, 4, and 8, the activity-related NRS score in week 4, the scores on pain and function subscales and the total score of WOMAC in week 4 and 16, and serum CGRP level in week 4 when compared with the baseline, separately (P<0.05); and PPTs at the center of knee point in week 2 and 4 and the lateral side in week 4 increased (P<0.05). After treatment and at each time point of follow-up visit, NRS scores at rest and during activity, the scores on each subscale and the total score of WOMAC, the score of CSI and serum levels of Glu, Gln, SP, and CGRP in the EA group were lower than those in the sham-EA group (P<0.05); PPTs at each site (except at the lateral side of knee point in week 2 and the deltoid point in week 16) and the scores of SF-12 (except mental health score of SF-12 in week 16) were higher in the EA group when compared with the sham-EA group (P<0.05). Change scores of NRS at rest and during activity were positively correlated with those of CSI in the EA group (P<0.05).
Electroacupuncture effectively alleviates chronic pain of KOA, improves joint function and quality of life, which may be achieved through the inhibition of central sensitization.

papers.title: [Acupuncture as main therapy for Ramsay-Hunt syndrome complicated with incomplete Vernet syndrome caused by otic herpes zoster: a case report].
papers.journal: Zhongguo zhen jiu = Chinese acupuncture & moxibustion
papers.authors: Sun W, Guo Y, Zhou Y, Zhang M
papers.abstract: This paper reports a case of Ramsay-Hunt syndrome complicated with incomplete Vernet syndrome caused by otic herpes zoster treated with acupuncture as the main therapy. The pathogenesis of the patient was spleen deficiency with dampness-heat, and blockage of the orifices and collaterals. The combination therapy of flash cupping, fire needling, acupuncture and Chinese materia medica was delivered. Flash cupping was performed on the affected side of the face, fire needling pricking was applied at the herpes zoster area; acupuncture was applied at local acupoints on the face, combined with the "experienced ten acupoints" and the acupuncture method of "ascending on the left and descending on the right" based on the theory of yiqi zhouliu (constant circulatory flowing of qi ), i.e. for the left side, acupoints of the three-yin meridians were selected and treated with twirling reinforcing manipulation, for the right side, acupoints of the three-yang meridians were selected and treated with the twirling reducing manipulation. The treatment was given once every 3 days, twice a week. After 1 month of treatment, the modified Yuebi Jiazhu decoction was given additionally for 14 doses. After 2 weeks of treatment, the herpes zoster resolved and the pain was relieved; after 1 month of treatment, the swallowing function was improved; after 2 months of treatment, the House-Brackmann (H-B) facial nerve function grade was decreased from grade Ⅵ to grade Ⅲ, the Sunnybrook facial grading system score was increased from 21 to 67, and the swallowing, hoarseness, auditory and gustatory functions, as well as the general condition were all improved; at 1 month follow-up, the condition of the patient remained stable.

papers.title: [Tongyuan acupuncture for postherpetic neuralgia: a randomized controlled trial].
papers.journal: Zhongguo zhen jiu = Chinese acupuncture & moxibustion
papers.authors: Zhang J, Cheng X, Tang W, Qu S, Peng L, Yan X et al.
papers.abstract:
To observe the clinical efficacy of Tongyuan acupuncture in treatment of postherpetic neuralgia (PHN).
A total of 106 patients with PHN were randomly divided into a Tongyuan electroacupuncture group (53 cases, 3 cases dropped out) and a conventional electroacupuncture group (53 cases, 4 cases dropped out, 2 cases were eliminated). In the Tongyuan electroacupuncture group, Baihui (GV20), Yintang (GV24+), Shuigou (GV26), Qihai (CV6), Guanyuan (CV4), ashi points and bilateral Xinshu (BL15), Geshu (BL17), Ganshu (BL18), Pishu (BL20), Tianshu (ST25) were selected, and 5 to 6 pairs of acupoints were selected to connect the electroacupuncture therapeutic apparatus; in the conventional electroacupuncture group, ashi points and Jiaji points (EX-B2) of the relevant ganglion segments in the affected area were selected, and Jiaji points (EX-B2) and ashi points were connected to the electroacupuncture therapeutic apparatus. In both groups, dense-disperse waves were selected at a frequency of 2 Hz/100 Hz and a current of 2 mA. The needles were retained for 30 min per session, once daily. Five sessions constituted one treatment course, with a 2-day interval between courses. A total of four treatment courses were administered. The simplified McGill pain questionnaire (SF-MPQ) score (including the pain rating index [PRI] score, visual analogue scale [VAS] score, and present pain intensity [PPI] score) of both groups were observed before treatment, after 2 weeks of treatment, and after 4 weeks of treatment. The Pittsburgh sleep quality index (PSQI) score, Hamilton anxiety scale (HAMA) score, and Hamilton depression scale (HAMD) score of both groups were observed before treatment and after 4 weeks of treatment. Clinical efficacy was evaluated after treatment, and pain recurrence was followed up at 3 months after treatment completion.
Compared with before treatment, the sub-scores and total scores of the SF-MPQ in both groups decreased after 2 and 4 weeks of treatment (P<0.05), and the scores after 4 weeks of treatment were lower than those after 2 weeks of treatment (P<0.05). After 2 weeks of treatment, the scores of VAS and PPI, and the total score of SF-MPQ in the Tongyuan electroacupuncture group were lower than those in the conventional electroacupuncture group (P<0.05). After 4 weeks of treatment, all sub-scores and total score of the SF-MPQ in the Tongyuan electroacupuncture group were lower than those in the conventional electroacupuncture group (P<0.05). After treatment, the PSQI, HAMA, and HAMD scores in both groups were lower than those before treatment (P<0.05); the PSQI, HAMA, and HAMD scores in the Tongyuan electroacupuncture group were lower than those in the conventional electroacupuncture group (P<0.05). The total effective rate and marked effective rate in the Tongyuan electroacupuncture group were 90.0% (45/50) and 72.0% (36/50), respectively, both higher than those in the conventional electroacupuncture group (74.5% [35/47] and 44.7% [21/47], P<0.05). During follow-up, the pain recurrence rate in the Tongyuan electroacupuncture group was 2.2% (1/45), which was lower than that in the conventional electroacupuncture group (17.1% [6/35], P<0.05).
Tongyuan acupuncture can alleviate pain, improve sleep disturbances, and ameliorate emotional comorbidities in patients with PHN, and its short-term and long-term efficacy is superior to that of conventional electroacupuncture.

papers.title: [Lying needling from Nanjing for malar melasma: a randomized controlled trial].
papers.journal: Zhongguo zhen jiu = Chinese acupuncture & moxibustion
papers.authors: Zhao X, Gu Y, Man J, Duan B, Yang M, Yu J et al.
papers.abstract:
To observe the clinical efficacy and safety of lying needling from Nanjing (Classic of Difficult Issues) in treating malar melasma.
A total of 78 patients with malar melasma were randomized into a lying needling group (39 cases, 1 case dropped out) and a sham acupuncture group (39 cases, 1 case was eliminated). Routine care was adopted in both groups. In the lying needling group, lying needling from Nanjing was applied, the malar melasma area and bilateral Erjian (LI2), Neiting (ST44), Qiangu (SI2), etc. were selected. In the sham acupuncture group, sham acupuncture with blunt-tip needle was applied at the same acupoints. Both groups were treated once daily, 3 times a week for 3 weeks. The scores of melasma area and severity index (MASI), dermatology life quality index (DLQI), skin lesion symptom, and infrared temperature of the melasma area were observed before and after treatment; the clinical efficacy and safety were evaluated after treatment in both groups.
After treatment, the MASI and skin lesion symptom scores were decreased compared with those before treatment (P<0.001), and the infrared temperature of the melasma area was increased compared with that before treatment in the lying needling group (P<0.001); the DLQI scores were decreased compared with those before treatment in both groups (P<0.01, P<0.05). The differences in the MASI score, skin lesion symptom score, and infrared temperature of the melasma area before and after treatment in the lying needling group were greater than those in the sham acupuncture group (P<0.001). The total effective rate was 89.5% (34/38) in the lying needling group, which was higher than 31.6% (12/38) in the sham acupuncture group (P<0.05). No adverse events occurred in the two groups.
Lying needling from Nanjing can effectively treat malar melasma, improve patients' clinical symptoms and quality of life, with good safety.

papers.title: Ultrasound-guided stellate ganglion acupuncture for chronic insomnia disorder using fNIRS: study protocol for a randomized controlled trial.
papers.journal: Frontiers in neurology
papers.authors: Zhang J, Song J, Hu J, Zhang W, Feng Y, Ding W et al.
papers.abstract:
Chronic insomnia disorder (CID) is common and often impairs daytime functioning and quality of life. Although cognitive behavioral therapy for insomnia and hypnotic medication are widely used, their clinical use may be limited by accessibility, cost, adherence, and concerns about long-term adverse effects. Acupuncture is commonly used for CID, but conventional acupuncture alone may require a relatively long treatment course. Because sympathetic hyperarousal plays an important role in insomnia, the stellate ganglion (SG) may represent a useful therapeutic target. This trial aims to evaluate the clinical efficacy and potential neurofunctional mechanisms of ultrasound-guided SG acupuncture combined with conventional acupuncture in patients with CID.
This single-center, parallel-group randomized controlled trial will enroll 80 patients with CID, who will be allocated in a 1:1 ratio to a treatment group or a control group. In addition, healthy controls will be recruited for baseline functional near-infrared spectroscopy (fNIRS) comparison only. Before fNIRS acquisition, healthy controls will undergo clinical screening and baseline assessments. The control group will receive conventional acupuncture, whereas the treatment group will receive ultrasound-guided SG acupuncture plus conventional acupuncture. Both groups will receive 12 treatment sessions over 4 weeks. Outcomes will be assessed at baseline, week 4, and week 8. The primary outcomes are the Insomnia Severity Index (ISI) and fNIRS data of brain function. Secondary outcomes include the Pittsburgh Sleep Quality Index (PSQI), Hamilton Anxiety Rating Scale (HAMA), and overall clinical efficacy.
This trial will determine whether ultrasound-guided SG acupuncture combined with conventional acupuncture provides additional benefit over conventional acupuncture alone for CID. It will also explore treatment-related changes in brain function by combining clinical scales with fNIRS assessment. The findings may provide more objective evidence for acupuncture-based treatment of CID and help clarify its neurofunctional basis.
https://itmctr.ccebtcm.org.cn/mgt/dashboard, ITMCTR2025000535.

papers.title: Naringenin as a potential immunomodulator for attenuating lung abnormal inflammation in Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease (COPD) via the NF-κB/NLRP3/Caspase-1 Axis.
papers.journal: Cytotechnology
papers.authors: Zhang Y, Gu L, Zhang X, Ran W, Yan Y, Gu H
papers.abstract: Pulmonary inflammation is a key feature of chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD), contributing to disease progression and morbidity. However, the molecular mechanisms underlying therapeutic interventions remain to be fully elucidated. This study aimed to investigate the mechanisms of naringenin in modulating COPD-related pulmonary inflammation. Using an integrated approach combining network pharmacology, molecular docking, and in vitro/in vivo models, we systematically explored the effects of naringenin. Network pharmacology analysis identified NF-κB as a central target, which was validated through molecular docking and dynamics simulations showing stable binding between naringenin and NF-κB. In vitro, cigarette smoke extract-challenged lung epithelial cells treated with naringenin exhibited reduced cytotoxicity, downregulated TNF-α, phospho-NF-κB p65, and NLRP3 expression, inhibited Caspase-1 activation, and attenuated IL-1β maturation, and suppressed Gasdermin D cleavage. In vivo, naringenin-treated COPD mice displayed diminished pulmonary inflammatory cell infiltration, milder histopathological lung damage, decreased serum TNF-α/IL-1β levels, and inhibited activation of the NF-κB/NLRP3/Caspase-1 axis in lung tissue. Collectively, these findings reveal that naringenin alleviates COPD pulmonary inflammation and pyroptosis by targeting the NF-κB/NLRP3/Caspase-1 signaling cascade, providing mechanistic insights for traditional Chinese medicine-based COPD therapies.
papers.title_ko: Naringenin이 NF-κB/NLRP3/Caspase-1 축을 통해 만성폐쇄성폐질환의 비정상 폐 염증을 완화하는 잠재적 면역조절제

summary.question: Naringenin이 COPD 관련 폐 염증과 pyroptosis를 억제하는지 평가했다.
summary.methods: 네트워크 약리학, 분자도킹, 세포 실험 및 COPD 마우스 모델을 통합해 naringenin의 작용기전을 탐색했다.
summary.results: Naringenin은 NF-κB/NLRP3/Caspase-1 축을 억제하며 염증성 사이토카인과 조직 손상을 감소시켰다.
summary.clinical_takeaway: 본 연구는 naringenin의 COPD 염증 조절 가능성을 시사하지만, 전임상 수준의 기전 근거로 임상 적용에는 추가 검증이 필요하다.
summary.limitations: 세포·동물 연구 중심이라 사람 COPD에서의 유효성과 안전성은 명확하지 않다.

pico.o: 폐 염증, pyroptosis, NF-κB/NLRP3/Caspase-1 활성

papers.title: Huachansu triggers mitochondrial apoptosis and ER stress to inhibit hepatocellular carcinoma progression.
papers.journal: Saudi pharmaceutical journal : SPJ : the official publication of the Saudi Pharmaceutical Society
papers.authors: Li X, Yan Q, Wu Q, Dong D, Zhang R, Meng Q et al.
papers.abstract: Huachansu, derived from the dried skin glands of the Chinese toad (Bufo bufo gargarizans), has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its anti-tumor properties, particularly in hepatocellular carcinoma (HCC). However, its molecular mechanisms remain unclear. This study investigates Huachansu's therapeutic potential by focusing on mitochondrial apoptosis and endoplasmic reticulum (ER) stress pathways. In vitro studies on HepG2 cells revealed that Huachansu (48-96 mg/mL for 24 h) disrupted mitochondrial function by elevating reactive oxygen species (ROS) generation (~ 83% and ~ 208% increase at 48 and 96 mg/mL, respectively) and reducing membrane potential. Molecular analyses showed upregulated pro-apoptotic Bax and ER stress effector CHOP alongside downregulated anti-apoptotic Bcl-2 and caspase family proteins, indicating PERK-ATF4 pathway activation. In vivo investigations using orthotopic and xenograft HCC mouse models demonstrated significant tumor volume (~ 25% at 2 g/kg and ~ 39% at 4 g/kg) and weight reduction with Huachansu treatment (2-4 g/kg/day, oral gavage for 18-21 days). Hepatic function improvements were evidenced by decreased serum ALT, AST, and LDH levels alongside increased superoxide dismutase (SOD) activity. Histopathological analyses confirmed reduced tumor progression and organ toxicity, while inflammatory cytokine profiling revealed diminished pro-inflammatory mediators. Mechanistically, Huachansu activated ER stress markers (PERK, ATF4) in tumor tissues without inducing systemic toxicity. These findings demonstrate that Huachansu exerts potent anticancer effects in HCC through concurrent induction of mitochondrial damage and ER stress activation. This study provides a mechanistic basis for Huachansu's traditional use and highlights its potential as a promising therapeutic agent for HCC treatment.
papers.title_ko: 화찬수(Huachansu)는 미토콘드리아 세포자멸사와 ER 스트레스를 유도해 간세포암 진행을 억제한다

summary.question: 화찬수가 간세포암의 진행을 어떤 분자기전으로 억제하는지 평가했다.
summary.methods: HepG2 세포와 간세포암 마우스 이식 모델에서 화찬수의 항종양 효과와 미토콘드리아 손상, ER 스트레스 관련 지표를 분석했다.
summary.results: 화찬수는 ROS 증가와 막전위 저하, Bax·CHOP 및 PERK-ATF4 활성화와 함께 종양 크기와 무게를 줄였고 간기능 및 조직병리 지표도 개선했다.
summary.clinical_takeaway: 전임상 자료에서 화찬수의 간세포암 억제 가능성이 보였지만, 임상 적용 전에는 사람 대상의 유효성과 안전성 근거가 더 필요하다.
summary.limitations: 세포 및 동물 실험 결과로 임상적 효과와 안전성을 직접 일반화할 수 없다.

pico.o: 미토콘드리아 손상, ER 스트레스 활성화, 종양 성장 억제 및 간기능 지표 변화

papers.title: Correlation between traditional Chinese medicine syndromes of gastro oesophageal reflux disease and high-resolution esophageal manometry findings a cross-sectional study.
papers.journal: Archives of physiology and biochemistry
papers.authors: Cai Y, Zhang Q, Song J, Zhao B, Zhang N
papers.abstract: Background: This multicentre study examined the association between TCM syndromes and HRM parameters in GERD patients. Methods: GERD patients were classified into seven syndromes and assessed for LESP, LESL, IRP, DL, DCI, IEM, and fragmented peristalsis. Results: HRM parameters differed significantly among TCM syndromes (p < 0.01). Liver-Stomach Depression Heat (28.3%, 128/452) and Gallbladder Heat Attacking Stomach (12.4%, 56/452) showed higher LESP (18.5 ± 4.2 and 17.8 ± 3.9 mmHg) and DCI, indicating hypermotility. Middle Deficiency with Qi Counterflow (18.1%, 82/452) and Stomach Yin Deficiency (9.3%, 42/452) showed lower LESP (9.2 ± 2.8 and 8.5 ± 2.5 mmHg) and higher IEM (68.3% and 73.8%), indicating hypomotility. Qi Depression and Phlegm Obstruction (15.0%, 68/452) correlated with fragmented peristalsis (35.3%). Blood Stasis Obstructing the Collaterals (5.8%, 26/452) showed increased IRP (11.2 ± 3.5 mmHg) and abnormal coordination, and Spleen Deficiency with Dampness-Heat was mainly hypomotile. Conclusion: TCM syndromes in GERD correspond to distinct HRM patterns.
papers.title_ko: 위식도 역류질환의 전통중의학 변증과 고해상도 식도운동검사 소견의 상관관계: 단면연구

summary.question: 위식도 역류질환에서 전통중의학 변증이 고해상도 식도운동검사 지표와 연관되는지 평가하였다.
summary.methods: 다기관 단면연구로 GERD 환자를 7개 변증으로 분류한 뒤 HRM의 여러 지표를 비교하였다.
summary.results: 변증군에 따라 HRM 지표가 유의하게 달랐으며, 일부 변증은 과운동성 또는 저운동성 패턴과 연관되었다.
summary.clinical_takeaway: GERD의 변증이 식도운동 이상과 서로 다른 양상을 보일 수 있어, 임상 해석 시 기능적 식도검사 소견과 함께 고려할 필요가 있다.
summary.limitations: 단면연구라 인과관계를 말할 수 없고, 변증 분류의 주관성과 일반화 가능성에 주의가 필요하다.

pico.o: 고해상도 식도운동검사 지표(LESP, LESL, IRP, DL, DCI, IEM, fragmented peristalsis)

papers.title: The inhibition of pathological IgE in allergic diseases by natural compounds.
papers.journal: Natural products and bioprospecting
papers.authors: Carnazza M, Begley M, Tiwari RK, Geliebter J, Yang N, Zhan J et al.
papers.abstract: IgE-mediated allergic diseases are common and greatly affect quality of life. Current therapeutic strategies include avoidance, which is unreliable, and unspecific symptom management, which causes adverse effects and are expensive. This urges the need for safe, effective, and affordable treatment options for infants, children, adolescents, and adults. This narrative review discusses naturally occurring compounds that have been researched in animal models, in vitro cell lines, and clinical trials to inhibit pathological IgE. These include Food Allergy Herbal Formula (FAHF)-1 and -2 and the derivatives B-FAHF-2, EBF-2, and berberine; Rubia cordifolia and its isolate xanthopurpurin; arctigenin; Anti-Asthma Herbal Medicine Intervention and its isolate formononetin; apigenin; luteolin; resveratrol; pterostilbene; and ginsenoside Rh1. Natural compounds largely work through reduction of IgE production of B cells through modulation of genes involved in B cell activation, differentiation and proliferation, and cell cycle. There is a resulting reduction of Th2 responses and mast cell degranulation, and hence allergic disease pathology and symptomology. There are rich resources of natural compounds, including those with the capacity to restore immunity to that seen in non-allergic individuals. Natural compounds are promising, novel treatment strategies for the vast sufferers of food allergy, allergic asthma, allergic rhinitis, and allergic eczema.
papers.title_ko: 천연 화합물에 의한 알레르기 질환의 병적 IgE 억제

summary.question: 천연 화합물이 알레르기 질환에서 병적 IgE를 억제할 수 있는지를 검토한 문헌이다.
summary.methods: 동물모델, 세포주, 임상시험에서 병적 IgE 억제를 다룬 천연 화합물을 정리한 서술적 문헌고찰이다.
summary.results: 여러 천연 화합물이 B세포의 IgE 생성 감소와 Th2 반응 및 비만세포 탈과립 억제와 연관되어 알레르기 병태를 완화할 가능성이 보고되었다.
summary.clinical_takeaway: 한약·본초 유래 성분은 알레르기 질환의 새로운 후보가 될 수 있으나, 현재 근거는 전임상과 제한된 임상 자료를 함께 포함한 수준으로 해석이 필요하다.
summary.limitations: 서술적 고찰로서 직접 비교와 효과 크기 평가가 어렵고, 포함된 근거의 수준이 균질하지 않다.

pico.p: IgE 매개 알레르기 질환 환자 및 관련 동물·세포 모델
pico.i: FAHF-1/2, B-FAHF-2, EBF-2, berberine, Rubia cordifolia, xanthopurpurin, arctigenin, AHM, formononetin, apigenin, luteolin, resveratrol, pterostilbene, ginsenoside Rh1 등 천연 화합물
pico.o: 병적 IgE 감소, Th2 반응 및 비만세포 탈과립 억제, 알레르기 증상/병태 완화

papers.title: Electroacupuncture Attenuates Anesthesia/Surgery-Induced Cognitive Impairment in Aged Rats by Inhibiting IL-17A Mediated Hippocampal Synaptic Dysfunction via the ERK/CREB Signaling Pathway.
papers.journal: Brain research bulletin
papers.authors: Gao Y, Li W, Ma Q, Zhao X, Wang Q
papers.abstract: Electroacupuncture (EA) has been identified as an effective intervention for mitigating postoperative cognitive dysfunction in the elderly; however, its underlying mechanisms remain inadequately understood. This study aimed to elucidate the neuroprotective effects of EA on anesthesia/surgery-induced cognitive impairment in aged rats through a combination of behavioral testing, RNA sequencing analysis, Golgi-Cox staining, dendritic spine analysis, Sholl analysis, immunofluorescence assays, and western blot analysis. The findings demonstrated that EA ameliorates anesthesia/surgery-induced cognitive decline by inhibiting hippocampal synaptic dysfunction, with a notable enrichment in the downregulation of IL-17A signaling and upregulation of ERK signaling. Furthermore, the study confirmed that an exogenous increase in IL-17A expression can induce hippocampal synaptic dysfunction and partially negate the neuroprotective effects of EA by inhibiting the expression of the ERK/CREB signaling pathway. In conclusion, EA attenuates anesthesia/surgery-induced cognitive impairment in aged rats by inhibiting IL-17A-mediated hippocampal synaptic dysfunction via the ERK/CREB signaling pathway.
papers.title_ko: 전침은 ERK/CREB 신호경로를 통해 IL-17A 매개 해마 시냅스 기능장애를 억제하여 노령 랫드의 마취/수술 유발 인지장애를 완화한다

summary.question: 전침이 노령 랫드의 마취/수술 유발 인지장애를 줄일 수 있는지와 그 기전이 무엇인지 평가했다.
summary.methods: 노령 랫드를 대상으로 행동검사, RNA 시퀀싱, Golgi-Cox 염색, 수상돌기 가시와 Sholl 분석, 면역형광 및 Western blot을 이용해 전침의 효과와 기전을 분석한 실험연구이다.
summary.results: 전침은 해마 시냅스 기능장애와 인지저하를 완화했으며, IL-17A 신호 억제와 ERK/CREB 신호 활성화가 관찰되었다.
summary.clinical_takeaway: 노령에서의 마취/수술 후 인지저하에 대해 전침의 신경보호 가능성이 제시되지만, 현재 근거는 동물실험이므로 임상 적용 전 추가 연구가 필요하다.
summary.limitations: 랫드 기반 기전 연구로 사람의 수술 후 인지기능에 대한 직접적 근거는 아니다.

pico.o: 인지기능 저하, 해마 시냅스 기능장애 및 관련 신호변화

papers.title: Deep fused explainable neural architecture for the automatic recognition of therapeutic medicinal plants.
papers.journal: Daru : journal of Faculty of Pharmacy, Tehran University of Medical Sciences
papers.authors: Govindaraj P, Sasikaladevi N
papers.abstract:
Medicinal plants have been utilized for centuries for their beneficial properties and significant impact on traditional medical systems worldwide. Indian medicinal plants and their therapeutic properties have recently gained increased attention from the global healthcare community. Accurate identification and classification of medicinal plants ensure proper therapeutic applications. However, botanists manually identify these plants, which is subjective, labor-intensive, and time-consuming.
The main objective of this study is to develop an accurate and automated classification of these medicinal plants for diverse applications such as conservation initiatives, quality assurance, and the formulation of novel herbal treatments.
A Deep Fused Explainable Neural Architecture termed MedPlantNet is proposed for robust recognition of medicinal plant leaves. The deep discriminative features are extracted from the medicinal plant images using a fine-tuned Deep Convolutional Neural Network (DCNN). A customized Support Vector Machine is developed to efficiently classify these extracted deep features. To enhance model interpretability, a meta-visualization framework incorporating Grad-CAM and Occlusion Sensitivity visualization is implemented to identify the regions of the image that contribute to the classification decisions. We utilized the Mendeley benchmark Medicinal plant leaf database with 30 classes to train and evaluate the model.
To assess the effectiveness of the proposed model, accuracy, specificity, sensitivity, and AUC are calculated. The proposed system outperforms existing state-of-the-art (SOTA) algorithms for medicinal plant classification, achieving an optimal maximum validation accuracy of 99.87% and AUC of 1. To further validate the generalizability external validation was performed on Bangladeshi medicinal plant dataset and MedLeaves dataset where the proposed model MedPlantNet attained 99.27% and 99.80% validation accuracy respectively.
MedPlantNet provides an automatic framework for medicinal plant identification based on deep feature extraction, classification and explainable visualization techniques. The results obtained indicate its potential utility in supporting biodiversity conservation, quality assurance and herbal medicine research.
papers.title_ko: 치료용 약용식물의 자동 인식을 위한 심층 융합 설명가능 신경망 구조

summary.question: 이 연구는 약용식물 잎의 자동 분류를 정확하게 수행할 수 있는 설명가능한 인공지능 모델이 있는지 평가했다.
summary.methods: 30개 범주의 약용식물 잎 데이터셋으로 미세조정된 DCNN과 커스텀 SVM을 결합한 MedPlantNet을 개발하고, Grad-CAM과 Occlusion Sensitivity로 설명가능성을 평가한 분류 연구이다.
summary.results: 제안 모델은 내부 검증에서 최대 정확도 99.87%와 AUC 1을 보였고, 외부 데이터셋에서도 높은 검증 정확도를 보여 기존 방법보다 우수했다.
summary.clinical_takeaway: 한의약 연구에서 약용식물의 동정과 품질 관리에 AI 기반 자동 분류가 보조 도구가 될 가능성이 있으나, 실제 임상 적용 전에는 데이터 편향과 외부 검증 범위를 함께 확인해야 한다.
summary.limitations: 이미지 기반 분류 연구로서 실제 현장 환경과 임상적 유효성을 직접 보여주지는 못한다.

pico.i: 미세조정 DCNN과 커스텀 SVM을 결합한 MedPlantNet
pico.o: 정확도, 특이도, 민감도, AUC

papers.title: Scalp Acupuncture Combined with Mouse Nerve Growth Factor Acupoint Injection for Post-stroke Cognitive Impairment.
papers.journal: Journal of molecular neuroscience : MN
papers.authors: Zhou H, Li M, Liu Y, Cheng X, Ma T
papers.abstract: Post-stroke cognitive impairment (PSCI) markedly impairs rehabilitation efficacy and quality of life. Safe and effective interventions are urgently needed. Eighty-four patients with PSCI were randomly allocated into three groups (n = 28 per group). Group A received conventional cognitive training. Group B received conventional training plus scalp acupuncture. Group C received the treatment of Group B combined with mouse nerve growth factor (mNGF) acupoint injection. All interventions lasted 4 weeks. All groups exhibited significant within-group improvements in MoCA, ADL, MBI, and FMA scores after intervention. Group C achieved the optimal cognitive efficacy:​ the post-treatment MoCA score was 26.7 ± 2.9 (95% CI, 25.53-27.87), significantly higher than that in Group A (21.5 ± 3.5 (95% CI, 20.22-22.78), P < 0.001) and Group B (23.8 ± 3.2)(95% CI, 22.48-25.12), P = 0.003). The ADL score in Group C was the lowest among the three groups (F = 28.963, P < 0.001), suggesting better independence. Moreover, motor function (FMA) and basic self-care ability (MBI) were also significantly improved in all groups after intervention. There were significant inter-group differences in post-treatment FMA and MBI scores (F-FMA = 29.745, P < 0.001; F-MBI = 35.872, P < 0.001). The scores increased gradually from Group A to Group C, with Group C achieving the best improvement. Conventional cognitive training improves cognitive function and daily living ability in patients with PSCI. Scalp acupuncture combined with conventional training is more effective than training alone. The triple therapy of conventional training, scalp acupuncture, and mNGF acupoint injection further enhances rehabilitation outcomes, with prominent clinical application value.
papers.title_ko: 뇌졸중 후 인지장애에서 두피침과 마우스 신경성장인자 혈위주사의 병용 효과

summary.question: 뇌졸중 후 인지장애 환자에서 두피침과 mNGF 혈위주사가 재활 성과를 더 향상시키는지 평가하였다.
summary.methods: 84명의 뇌졸중 후 인지장애 환자를 3군으로 무작위 배정해 4주간 인지훈련 단독, 인지훈련+두피침, 인지훈련+두피침+mNGF 혈위주사를 비교한 RCT이다.
summary.results: 모든 군에서 MoCA, ADL, MBI, FMA가 호전되었고, 인지훈련+두피침+mNGF 혈위주사군이 MoCA와 ADL, FMA, MBI에서 가장 큰 개선을 보여 가장 우수한 재활 성과를 보였다.
summary.clinical_takeaway: 이 연구는 두피침에 mNGF 혈위주사를 병용하면 뇌졸중 후 인지장애의 인지 및 기능 지표가 더 좋아질 가능성을 시사하지만, 단일 연구 결과이므로 임상 적용은 신중하게 해석해야 한다.
summary.limitations: 단일 연구의 단기간(4주) 추적 결과이며, 장기 효과와 재현성은 확인되지 않았다.

pico.o: MoCA, ADL, MBI, FMA 점수

papers.title: Clinical efficacy and safety of acupotomy for acute ischemic stroke: A retrospective study.
papers.journal: Medicine
papers.authors: Wu X, Yang Y, Wu J
papers.abstract: Acute ischemic stroke (AIS) is a major cause of persistent neurological impairment and functional dependence. Adjunctive interventions that may enhance rehabilitation-associated recovery warrant pragmatic evaluation in routine clinical settings. This retrospective cohort study consecutively enrolled adults with imaging-confirmed AIS admitted between January 1, 2018 and December 31, 2021. Patients received either standard post-stroke rehabilitation alone (control, n = 61) or standard rehabilitation plus acupotomy (observation, n = 98). Baseline demographics, vascular risk factors, stroke characteristics (including Trial of ORG 10172 in Acute Stroke Treatment [TOAST] classification and infarct territory), and admission status were extracted from electronic records. Primary outcomes were neurological and functional status at discharge assessed by the National Institutes of Health Stroke Scale (NIHSS) and Modified Barthel Index (MBI), with change scores calculated as ΔNIHSS (baseline minus discharge) and ΔMBI (discharge minus baseline). Safety outcomes included procedure-related events, overall adverse events, and serious adverse events. Baseline characteristics were comparable between groups. At discharge, the acupotomy plus rehabilitation group had a lower NIHSS score (4.46 ± 4.05 vs 6.00 ± 4.29; P = .026) and greater ΔNIHSS (4.67 ± 2.19 vs 3.22 ± 2.49; P < .001). Functional recovery favored adjunctive acupotomy, with higher discharge MBI (76.66 ± 22.85 vs 60.68 ± 25.75; P < .001) and greater ΔMBI (28.25 ± 14.05 vs 17.82 ± 10.45; P < .001). Procedure-related events were infrequent, and overall and serious adverse event rates were similar. Treatment effects were directionally consistent across prespecified subgroups without significant interaction. Adjunctive acupotomy was associated with improved short-term neurological and functional outcomes without an observed increase in serious safety events in hospitalized AIS patients.
papers.title_ko: 급성 허혈성 뇌졸중에서 침도 치료의 임상적 유효성과 안전성: 후향적 연구

summary.question: 급성 허혈성 뇌졸중 입원 환자에서 재활에 침도 치료를 추가하면 단기 신경학적·기능적 예후가 개선되는지 평가하였다.
summary.methods: 영상으로 확진된 급성 허혈성 뇌졸중 환자를 대상으로 표준 재활 단독군과 재활+침도군을 비교한 후향적 코호트 연구이다.
summary.results: 침도 병행군은 퇴원 시 NIHSS와 MBI가 더 좋았고 변화량도 더 컸으며, 중대한 안전성 사건 증가는 관찰되지 않았다.
summary.clinical_takeaway: 입원 급성 허혈성 뇌졸중에서 침도 병행이 단기 회복과 연관될 수 있으나, 후향적 연구이므로 인과적 해석은 신중해야 한다.
summary.limitations: 후향적 단일 시점 퇴원 평가 연구로 교란과 선택 편향을 배제하기 어렵고 장기 예후는 알 수 없다.

pico.p: 영상으로 확진된 입원 급성 허혈성 뇌졸중 성인 환자
pico.o: 퇴원 시 NIHSS, MBI 및 안전성 사건

papers.title: Differential expression of the C-Myc gene in intestinal-type and diffuse-type gastric cancer and its clinical significance.
papers.journal: BMC gastroenterology
papers.authors: Lian L, Wang X, Shen J, Hu P, Yang Q
papers.abstract:
To investigate the differential expression of the c-Myc proto-oncogene in intestinal-type gastric cancer (ITGC), diffuse-type gastric cancer (DTGC), and gastric mucosal intestinal metaplasia (IM), and to assess its clinical significance.
A total of 262 archived paraffin-embedded gastric tissue specimens were obtained from Putuo Hospital, Shanghai University of Traditional Chinese Medicine, collected between January 2016 and December 2024. The specimens included 30 samples of normal gastric mucosa (NM), 180 of IM (subclassified as mild [n = 60], moderate [n = 60], and severe [n = 60]), 30 of ITGC, and 22 of DTGC. C-Myc protein expression was evaluated by immunohistochemistry using the EnVision™ system and categorized as low (< 15% positive cells), moderate (15%-40%), or high (≥ 40%). Statistical analyses were performed using the Mantel-Haenszel trend test, Kruskal-Wallis test, Duncan's multiple comparison test, and chi-square test.
C-Myc expression differed significantly among gastric mucosal lesions (P < 0.001). Moderate IM exhibited higher c-Myc expression than NM, DTGC, and severe IM (P < 0.05). High c-Myc expression was more frequent in ITGC (26.67%) than in DTGC (4.55%), NM, or severe IM (P < 0.05). Among IM subtypes, types I and II IM demonstrated elevated c-Myc expression compared with NM and DTGC (P < 0.05), while type III IM exhibited lower expression levels. Patients with ITGC were significantly older than those in other cohorts (P < 0.05). Female predominance was observed in the NM group, whereas male predominance was observed in the ITGC group.
C-Myc expression shows stage-specific heterogeneity during gastric carcinogenesis. The significantly higher c-Myc expression in ITGC compared with DTGC supports the molecular basis of the Lauren classification and may aid in the development of targeted therapeutic strategies.
papers.title_ko: 장형과 미만형 위암에서 C-Myc 유전자의 차등 발현과 그 임상적 의의

summary.question: 장형 위암, 미만형 위암, 위점막 장상피화생에서 C-Myc 발현이 서로 다른지와 그 임상적 의미를 평가하고자 했다.
summary.methods: 저장된 파라핀 포매 위조직 262예를 대상으로 면역조직화학염색으로 C-Myc 단백 발현을 평가한 후 군 간 차이를 비교한 후향적 코호트 연구이다.
summary.results: C-Myc 발현은 병변 단계에 따라 유의하게 달랐고, 장형 위암에서 미만형 위암보다 높은 발현이 더 흔했다.
summary.clinical_takeaway: C-Myc 발현 차이는 위발암 과정과 Lauren 분류의 분자적 이질성을 시사하므로, 병리 해석과 연구적 표적 탐색의 참고가 될 수 있다.
summary.limitations: 단일 기관의 후향적 조직 연구로, 임상 예후나 치료 효과를 직접 입증하지는 못한다.

papers.title: Expert consensus on the management of nocturnal enuresis in children.
papers.journal: World journal of pediatrics : WJP
papers.authors: Shen Q, Xu H, Cooperative Group Member
papers.abstract:
Nocturnal enuresis (NE) is a common condition in childhood that can adversely affect children's physical and psychological health. Since the publication of the "Expert Consensus on the Management of Monosymptomatic Nocturnal Enuresis in Chinese Children" in 2014, substantial clinical experience has been accumulated and international guidelines have been updated, necessitating a revision to standardize and improve clinical management.
This consensus was developed by the Chinese Cooperative Group for the Management of Pediatric Nocturnal Enuresis, the Pediatric Nephrology Committee of the Chinese Medical Doctor Association using the Delphi method. A core writing group of nine experts drafted statements based on a synthesis of current evidence. These were subjected to iterative voting by 42 multidisciplinary panelists to achieve consensus, defined as ≥ 90% agreement.
The consensus provides 18 key recommendations. It updates the diagnostic criteria for children aged ≥ 5 years with at least one involuntary void per month for three months. It emphasizes classification into monosymptomatic (MNE) or nonmonosymptomatic (NMNE) NE based on daytime lower urinary tract symptoms. Recommendations cover comprehensive evaluation (history, physical exam, voiding diary), basic management (education, lifestyle), and first-line treatment (desmopressin for nocturnal polyuria, alarm therapy for reduced bladder capacity). Strategies for treatment-resistant cases, management of NMNE (prioritizing daytime symptoms), and the role of primary care and traditional Chinese medicine are outlined.
This expert consensus provides an updated, evidence-based, and practical framework for the diagnosis and management of childhood NE. It aims to harmonize clinical practice, promote individualized care, and improve patient outcomes through standardized recommendations.
papers.title_ko: 소아 야뇨증 관리에 대한 전문가 합의

summary.question: 소아 야뇨증의 진단과 관리에 대한 최신 표준화 권고는 무엇인가?
summary.methods: 중국 전문가 집단이 기존 근거와 최신 가이드라인을 바탕으로 델파이 방법으로 합의안을 도출한 전문가 합의문이다.
summary.results: 18개의 핵심 권고가 제시되었고, 5세 이상에서 3개월간 월 1회 이상 야간 배뇨가 있으면 진단하며 무증상형과 비무증상형으로 구분하도록 정리했다.
summary.clinical_takeaway: 한의사는 소아 야뇨증에서 배뇨형, 주간 하부요로증상, 배뇨일지 등 기본 평가를 우선 확인하고, 한약은 합의문에 언급된 보조적 역할 수준으로 신중히 해석해야 한다.
summary.limitations: 전문가 합의문으로서 임상시험 수준의 직접 비교 근거보다 전문가 의견의 비중이 크다.

pico.i: 델파이 방법으로 도출된 진단·관리 전문가 합의와 한의학의 역할 언급

papers.title: Flos Puerariae-Semen Hoveniae herb pair ameliorates acute alcohol-induced liver injury by dual-modulating IL-11-driven inflammation and restoring lipid homeostasis via the PI3K/AKT/mTOR pathway.
papers.journal: Journal of ethnopharmacology
papers.authors: Li S, Wang P, Xu Y, Shang Y, Zhao S, Yu C et al.
papers.abstract:
The flowers of Pueraria Lobata (Willd.) Ohwi and Semen Hoveniae (FS) herb pair is a classic Traditional Chinese Medicine (TCM) formulation long utilized for alleviating alcohol intoxication, relieving hangovers, and protecting the liver. Although it has been widely applied in clinical practice to treat alcoholic liver disease (ALD), the mechanisms underlying its multi-target efficacy, particularly its active absorbed constituents and their impact on lipid metabolism and inflammatory pathways, warrant further investigation.
To elucidate the active material basis and multi-target mechanisms of FS herb pair against acute alcohol-induced liver injury (AALI) by integrating serum pharmacochemistry, network pharmacology, lipidomics, and in vivo experimental validation.
Bioactive components absorbed in rat serum following oral administration were identified using HPLC-FT-ICR MS. Potential therapeutic targets were computationally predicted and their possible binding interactions were assessed via molecular docking. In vivo, a mouse model of AALI was established and treated with the FS herb pair. Hepatoprotective effects were evaluated through histopathology, biochemical assays, oxidative stress indicators, and inflammatory cytokine profiling. Serum lipid profiles were analyzed using UPLC-QE-Orbitrap-MS-based lipidomics, and key signaling proteins (PI3K, AKT, mTOR, CYP2E1) and IL-11 expression were assessed by Western blotting and immunofluorescence.
A total of 20 FS herb pair-derived prototype components were identified in rat serum. Integrated analysis prioritized potential interactions between these constituents and targets such as AKT1, TNF, and EGFR, which were supported by favorable computationally predicted docking scores. In vivo validation demonstrated that FS herb pair significantly ameliorated alcohol-induced hepatic histopathological damage, reduced ALT, AST, and lipid accumulation (TC, TG). Mechanistically, FS herb pair suppressed CYP2E1-mediated oxidative stress (ROS, MDA) and downregulated the pro-inflammatory IL-11 signaling axis. Lipidomic analysis identified 44 lipid biomarkers, revealing that FS herb pair restored glycerophospholipid and fatty acid metabolism homeostasis. Alcohol exposure suppressed PI3K/AKT/mTOR signaling, and FS herb pair treatment partially restored this pathway. The observation that LY294002 attenuated the protective effects of FS herb pair provides pharmacological evidence consistent with a role for PI3K/AKT/mTOR activation in FS-mediated hepatoprotection.
The traditional FS herb pair alleviates AALI through a multi-dimensional mechanism. It dually mitigates CYP2E1/ROS-driven oxidative stress and IL-11-mediated inflammation, while restoring lipid homeostasis associated with the activation of the PI3K/AKT/mTOR pathway. This study provides supporting preclinical evidence for the traditional use of FS herb pair in AALI management.
papers.title_ko: 푸얼라리아 꽃-호베니아 씨 약물 쌍이 PI3K/AKT/mTOR 경로를 통해 IL-11 매개 염증과 지질 항상성을 조절하여 급성 알코올성 간손상을 완화한다

summary.question: 푸얼라리아 꽃-호베니아 씨 약물 쌍이 급성 알코올 유발 간손상을 어떤 다중 표적 기전으로 완화하는지 평가하였다.
summary.methods: 혈청 약물화학, 네트워크 약리학, 지질체학과 마우스 급성 알코올성 간손상 모델을 결합해 성분, 표적, 신호경로와 간보호 효과를 검증하였다.

summary.clinical_takeaway: 전임상 자료로서 알코올성 간손상에 대한 본초 복합 처방의 다중 표적 가능성을 시사하지만, 임상 적용 근거로는 추가 연구가 필요하다.

papers.title: Hypericum japonicum Thunb. ex Murray inhibits hepatocellular carcinoma angiogenesis through the TF/FVIIa-mediated signaling pathway.
papers.journal: Journal of ethnopharmacology
papers.authors: Ma H, Li Q, Lu M, Mo T, Yang S, Feng Y et al.
papers.abstract:
Hypericum japonicum Thunb. ex Murray (Hypericaceae), named 'Tianjihuang' is a traditional Chinese medicine with hepatoprotective, antibacterial, and antitumour effects. In Chinese ethnic medicines, H. japonicum is used as a raw material for treatment of acute and chronic hepatitis, and is often called " hepatitis herb". Given that chronic hepatitis is a well-established risk factor for hepatocellular carcinoma (HCC), this traditional use provides a strong ethnopharmacological rationale for investigating its anti-HCC mechanisms. However, the mechanism and active ingredients of H. japonicum extract inhibiting HCC and angiogenesis remain unclear.
This study aims to comprehensively evaluate the anti-HCC angiogenesis effects of H. japonicum extract through both in vivo and in vitro experiments, and to preliminarily investigate its underlying molecular mechanisms and target proteins.
In vivo therapeutic efficacy of H. japonicum extract was validated in zebrafish. Network pharmacology, molecular docking and surface plasmon resonance (SPR) approaches were employed to predict potential targets and signaling pathways. In vitro, EA.hy926 cells were treated with conditioned medium (CM) derived from H. japonicum extract-exposed HepG2 cells to assess migration and tube formation capabilities. VEGF content in the CM was also detected. Effect of bioactive compound Quercetin-7-O-α-L-rhamnoside (Q7R) on coagulation factor VIIa (FVIIa) cellular localization was determined by immunofluorescence, while key signaling proteins were analyzed by Western blot.
In vivo zebrafish assay revealed that H. japonicum extract at 25 μg/mL suppressed embryonic intersegmental angiogenesis by 49.41%, demonstrating its potent anti-angiogenic activity. To elucidate the underlying mechanisms, we integrated UPLC-HRMS-based phytochemical profiling with network pharmacology, which identified tissue factor (TF) as a candidate target. Molecular docking further supported this finding by showing strong binding affinity between the bioactive constituents of H. japonicum and the TF/FVIIa complex. Functionally, conditioned medium from H. japonicum-treated HepG2 cells significantly impaired EA.hy926 endothelial cell migration and tube formation, concomitant with a marked reduction in VEGF levels. Notably, treatment with 10 μM Q7R, a flavonoid component of H. japonicum, attenuated FVIIa-stimulated VEGF hypersecretion in HepG2 cells by 52.2%. Mechanistic dissection revealed that Q7R acts through the TF/FVIIa/PAR2 axis to curb aberrant downstream PI3K-AKT and ERK signaling, thereby curtailing VEGF production and secretion, which in turn suppresses endothelial cell migration and tubulogenesis.
H. japonicum and its bioactive compound Q7R inhibit HCC angiogenesis by targeting the TF/FVIIa-mediated pathway and downstream PI3K/AKT and MAPK signaling, reducing VEGF expression. These findings reveal a novel mechanism of action for H. japonicum and support its potential as an anti-angiogenic agent for HCC therapy.
papers.title_ko: Hypericum japonicum Thunb. ex Murray의 TF/FVIIa 매개 신호경로를 통한 간세포암 혈관신생 억제

summary.question: H. japonicum 추출물과 주요 성분이 간세포암의 혈관신생을 억제하는지와 그 기전을 규명하는 것이었다.
summary.methods: 제브라피시 in vivo 실험과 HepG2-EA.hy926 in vitro 공배양계에서 혈관신생, 이동, 관상형성 및 VEGF를 평가하고, 네트워크 약리학·분자도킹·SPR·Western blot으로 기전을 분석했다.
summary.results: H. japonicum 추출물과 Quercetin-7-O-α-L-rhamnoside는 TF/FVIIa/PAR2 축과 하위 PI3K-AKT 및 ERK 신호를 억제하면서 VEGF를 감소시켜 혈관신생을 줄였다.
summary.clinical_takeaway: 이 연구는 H. japonicum이 간세포암의 혈관신생 표적 후보가 될 수 있음을 시사하지만, 전임상 결과이므로 임상적 유효성과 안전성은 추가 검증이 필요하다.
summary.limitations: 제브라피시와 세포 실험 중심의 전임상 연구로, 사람 대상 효능과 안전성을 직접 보여주지 못했다.

pico.o: 혈관신생, 세포 이동 및 관상형성, VEGF 발현

papers.title: Identification of anti-fibrotic components of Bofutsushosan under conditions of age-associated obesity in mice.
papers.journal: Phytomedicine : international journal of phytotherapy and phytopharmacology
papers.authors: Onishi A, Onodera T, Sugaya S, Matsushita T, Komorisono M, Shin J et al.
papers.abstract:
Bofutsushosan (BTS) is a traditional herbal medicine used to reduce body weight, edema, and constipation. Aged individuals often present pro-fibrotic comorbidities such as metabolic dysfunction-associated steatohepatitis (MASH), chronic kidney disease, and heart failure with preserved ejection fraction. Although the weight-reducing effect of BTS is well recognized, its effects under aged conditions remain uncharacterized.
To characterize the anti-fibrotic effects of BTS under age-associated obesity and identify the components responsible.
An aged diet-induced obese mouse model combined with an in vitro TGFβ-induced fibrosis model in 3T3-L1 preadipocytes, followed by component-resolved screening and reformulation of BTS.
63-week-old mice were fed a high-fat diet containing 2% BTS for 2 months, and tissues were analyzed by histology and qPCR. In 3T3-L1 preadipocytes, pro-fibrotic gene expression and SMAD2/3 phosphorylation were assessed following treatment with whole BTS, single-component-depleted BTS, or individual components.
BTS reduced body weight by 14.8% with decreased food intake, reduced adipose tissue size, and ameliorated hepatic steatosis. Pro-fibrotic genes were reduced in adipose tissue and liver, including 60.6% and 46.2% reductions of Col1a1. BTS suppressed TGFβ-mediated pro-fibrotic gene expression and SMAD2/3 phosphorylation in 3T3-L1 preadipocytes. Among the 18 components, Sal Mirabilis was the primary pro-fibrotic constituent, whereas Forsythiae Fructus, Zingiberis Rhizoma, Rhei Rhizoma, and Scutellariae Radix were anti-fibrotic. A modified formula lacking Sal Mirabilis and supplemented with these four ingredients exerted a stronger anti-fibrotic effect.
BTS exerts anti-fibrotic effects under age-associated obesity, and its therapeutic potential can be enhanced by removing pro-fibrotic and increasing anti-fibrotic components.
papers.title_ko: 고령성 비만 마우스에서 방풍통성산의 항섬유화 성분 규명

summary.question: 고령 관련 비만 조건에서 방풍통성산의 항섬유화 효과와 그에 관여하는 성분이 무엇인지 평가하였다.
summary.methods: 고령 식이유도 비만 마우스와 TGFβ 유도 섬유화 3T3-L1 전지방세포 모델에서 방풍통성산 전체 처방, 성분 제거 처방, 단일 성분을 비교한 실험 연구이다.
summary.results: 방풍통성산은 체중, 지방조직 크기, 간 지방증과 섬유화 관련 유전자 발현을 감소시켰고, Sal Mirabilis는 친섬유화 성분이었으며 네 가지 약재를 포함한 수정 처방이 더 강한 항섬유화 효과를 보였다.
summary.clinical_takeaway: 고령성 비만과 관련된 섬유화 맥락에서 방풍통성산의 항섬유화 가능성을 시사하지만, 성분 구성에 따라 효과가 달라질 수 있어 근거 해석에 주의가 필요하다.
summary.limitations: 마우스와 세포실험 기반의 전임상 연구이므로 임상적 유효성과 안전성을 직접 결론내릴 수 없다.

pico.p: 고령 식이유도 비만 마우스와 TGFβ 유도 섬유화 3T3-L1 전지방세포
pico.o: 체중, 지방조직 및 간 지방증, 섬유화 관련 유전자 발현과 SMAD2/3 인산화

papers.title: Press-needle therapy combined with sensory integration training in children with mild to moderate Tic disorders: A randomized controlled trial.
papers.journal: Medicine
papers.authors: Ge SN, Hu WL, Wang CL, Xie HY, Wu T
papers.abstract:
This study aimed to evaluate the efficacy and safety of press-needle therapy (PNT) with sensory integration training (SIT) compared to SIT alone or standard pharmacological treatment with tiapride hydrochloride in children with mild to moderate tic disorders (TD).
A prospective, three-arm, randomized controlled trial was conducted with 162 children aged 6 to 12 years meeting DSM-5 criteria for persistent TD (mild to moderate severity). Participants were randomly assigned in a 1:1:1 ratio to one of 3 groups: Group 1 (PNT plus SIT, n = 54); Group 2 (SIT alone, n = 54); or Group 3 (oral tiapride hydrochloride, n = 54). The intervention period lasted 12 weeks with a subsequent 12-week follow-up. Primary outcomes included changes in the Yale Global Tic Severity Scale (YGTSS) total score and the traditional Chinese medicine syndrome score. Secondary outcomes comprised of clinical response rate (≥30% YGTSS reduction) and adverse events.
All 3 groups showed statistically significant improvements from baseline in both YGTSS and traditional Chinese medicine syndrome scores at weeks 6 and 12 (all P < .05). Statistically significant between-group differences were observed at week 12 and at the 12-week posttreatment follow-up (all P < .01). All 3 groups achieved high overall response rates, with no statistically significant differences among them (P > .05). Group 2 showed a slightly lower response rate (92.59%) compared to Groups 1 and 3 (both 98.15%). No adverse events occurred in Group 1. One case (1.9%) was reported in Group 2, and 5 cases (9.3%) in Group 3. The incidence of adverse events differed significantly among the groups (P < .05).
PNT combined SIT provides significant clinical benefits over SIT alone and offers tic reduction comparable to first-line pharmacological treatment, without associated side effects. These findings suggest that PNT combined SIT may serve as a safe and effective non-pharmacological alternative for managing pediatric TD.
papers.title_ko: 경피침 치료와 감각통합훈련 병행이 경증~중등도 틱장애 아동에서 효과와 안전성을 보인 무작위대조시험

summary.question: 경증~중등도 틱장애 아동에서 경피침 치료와 감각통합훈련 병행이 감각통합훈련 단독 또는 티아프리드와 비교해 효과와 안전성이 더 나은지 평가했다.
summary.methods: 6~12세 지속성 틱장애 아동 162명을 3군 무작위 배정하여 12주간 경피침+감각통합훈련, 감각통합훈련 단독, 또는 티아프리드 치료를 비교한 전향적 무작위대조시험이다.
summary.results: 세 군 모두 YGTSS와 한의 변증 점수가 유의하게 호전되었고, 12주 시점과 추적관찰에서 군 간 차이가 있었으며, 이상반응은 경피침+감각통합훈련군에서 가장 적었다.
summary.clinical_takeaway: 이 연구는 경피침과 감각통합훈련 병행이 소아 틱장애에서 비약물적 대안이 될 가능성을 시사하지만, 단일 연구 결과이므로 임상 적용 전 추가 근거가 필요하다.
summary.limitations: 단일 연구의 비교시험 결과이며, 보고된 추적 기간이 제한적이라 장기 효과와 일반화 가능성에 주의가 필요하다.

pico.c: 감각통합훈련 단독 또는 경구 티아프리드 하이드로클로라이드

papers.title: Research trends of acupuncture for cancer: A bibliometric analysis (2014-2023).
papers.journal: Medicine
papers.authors: Bao Y, Feng Y, Shen Z, Zhou M, Liang B, Wang R
papers.abstract:
Acupuncture has been widely investigated as a complementary therapy for symptom management in patients with cancer. This study conducted a bibliometric analysis to comprehend global research trends, hotspots, scientific frontiers, and output characteristics of acupuncture for cancer (2014-2023).
Publications on the use of acupuncture for cancer from 2014 to 2023 were retrieved from the Web of Science Core Collection. CiteSpace 6.2.R4, VOSviewer 1.6.19, Scimago Graphica, and Microsoft Excel were used for bibliometric analysis. The main analyses included collaboration analyses of countries, institutions, authors, and journals, together with keyword co-occurrence, citation burst, and reference co-citation analyses.
A total of 1427 publications were retrieved. Annual publication output generally increased during the study period, particularly for clinical studies. The most studies were published in China, and Memorial Sloan Kettering Cancer Center made the most significant contribution in this field. Furthermore, Mao had the most publications, whereas Molassiotis had the highest citation ranking. "Evidence-based Complementary and Alternative Medicine" and "Journal of Ethnopharmacology" were the most commonly and centrally referenced journals, respectively. Among the referenced studies, the article published by Hershman was the most cited and deliberated on. Common keywords included "Vasomotor symptoms," "Electroacupuncture," "Quality of life," and "Mechanism.
This bibliometric analysis maps the publication landscape, collaboration networks, and major research themes of acupuncture for cancer. Emerging work on acupuncture and cancer immunotherapy is gaining attention.
papers.title_ko: 암에 대한 침 치료 연구 동향: 계량서지학적 분석(2014–2023)

summary.question: 2014~2023년 암에 대한 침 치료 연구의 전반적 동향과 주요 연구 주제는 무엇인지 평가했다.
summary.methods: Web of Science Core Collection 자료를 대상으로 CiteSpace, VOSviewer 등을 이용해 국가·기관·저자·저널 협력과 키워드, 인용 폭주, 공인용 분석을 시행한 계량서지학적 연구이다.
summary.results: 해당 기간 출판 수는 전반적으로 증가했으며, 중국의 논문 수가 가장 많았고 암 면역치료와 침의 연계가 새로운 관심 분야로 나타났다.
summary.clinical_takeaway: 암 관련 침 치료 연구는 증상 관리 중심의 근거 축적이 확대되고 있어, 최신 문헌에서는 전기침·삶의 질·혈관운동 증상 및 면역치료 연계 주제를 함께 살펴볼 필요가 있다.
summary.limitations: 계량서지학 분석이므로 임상적 유효성이나 안전성을 직접 평가한 연구는 아니다.

papers.title: Association between tongue ultrasonographic characteristics, Yin-deficiency constitution, and intrinsic capacity impairment in older adults: An exploratory cross-sectional study.
papers.journal: Medicine
papers.authors: Chen KT, Chao CL, Hsieh MT, Hsieh TJ, Lin CT, Chiang PH et al.
papers.abstract: Population aging is accompanied by a progressive decline in intrinsic capacity, yet objective measures reflecting underlying physiological changes remain limited. Yin-deficiency constitution in traditional Chinese medicine has been associated with intrinsic capacity impairment, but its structural correlates remain unclear. This exploratory study investigated associations among tongue ultrasonographic characteristics, Yin-deficiency constitution, and intrinsic capacity impairment in older adults. In this exploratory cross-sectional study, community-dwelling older adults attending a traditional Chinese medicine outpatient clinic (n = 123; mean age 71.6 ± 4.6 years) completed the Constitution in Chinese Medicine Questionnaire-Elderly Edition. Tongue thickness and echo intensity were measured using standardized ultrasonographic protocols, and intrinsic capacity was assessed using the Integrated Care for Older People (ICOPE) framework. Higher tongue echo intensity was associated with lower tongue thickness and higher Yin-deficiency scores. In multivariable linear regression analyses, tongue thickness remained strongly associated with tongue echo intensity (β = -0.548, P < .001), whereas the association between Yin-deficiency scores and tongue echo intensity became attenuated and was no longer statistically significant after adjustment for tongue thickness (β = -0.135, P = .079). Yin-deficiency constitution was associated with cognitive impairment (odds ratio = 2.79, 95% confidence interval = 1.13-6.89, P = .026) and visual impairment (odds ratio = 3.74, 95% confidence interval = 1.57-8.96, P = .003), whereas tongue echo intensity alone was not independently associated with ICOPE-defined intrinsic capacity impairments. Thickness-adjusted sensitivity analyses showed attenuated but directionally consistent findings. Tongue echo intensity appears to reflect structural variation in tongue musculature rather than an independent constitution-specific characteristic. Yin-deficiency constitution was associated with cognitive and visual impairment, whereas tongue echo intensity was not independently associated with ICOPE-defined intrinsic capacity impairments. These findings are exploratory and require validation in larger multicenter cohorts.
papers.title_ko: 노인에서 설초음파 특성, 음허 체질, 그리고 내재적 기능 저하의 연관성: 탐색적 횡단면 연구

summary.question: 노인에서 설초음파 지표와 음허 체질, 내재적 기능 저하가 서로 연관되는지 확인하고자 했다.
summary.methods: 지역사회 거주 노인을 대상으로 한 탐색적 횡단면 연구에서 설문, 혀 초음파, ICOPE 평가를 이용해 연관성을 분석했다.
summary.results: 혀 에코 강도는 혀 두께와는 관련되었으나 조정 후 음허 점수와의 독립적 연관성은 약해졌고, 음허 체질은 인지 및 시각 장애와 연관되었지만 혀 에코 강도 자체는 내재적 기능 저하와 독립적으로 연관되지 않았다.
summary.clinical_takeaway: 설초음파의 에코 강도는 체질 특이 지표라기보다 혀 근육 구조 차이를 반영할 가능성이 있어, 한의 임상에서는 체질 및 기능평가와 함께 해석해야 한다.
summary.limitations: 단일 외래 기반의 탐색적 횡단면 연구로 인과성을 판단할 수 없고, 더 큰 다기관 코호트에서 검증이 필요하다.

pico.p: 한의 외래를 방문한 지역사회 거주 노인
pico.o: 음허 체질, 인지·시각 장애, ICOPE 정의 내재적 기능 저하

papers.title: A comparative study on the pharmacological effects of Achyranthes root against atherosclerosis in ApoE-/- mice based on the spectrum-effect relationship.
papers.journal: Laboratory animal research
papers.authors: Zou X, Su J, Gao B, Lei S, Li X, Li B
papers.abstract:
In traditional Chinese medicine, herbal processing is used to modify the effects of herbs. Achyranthes bidentata BL (Niu Xi) is commonly used to treat atherosclerosis and cardiovascular diseases, in both raw (RC) and salted (SRC) forms. Salting is known to enhance its effects, particularly on kidney function, but the differences in anti-atherosclerosis efficacy between RC and SRC have not been studied.
A total of 491 and 501 chemical components were identified in RC and SRC, respectively, with 337 shared components. RC at a high dose (2.4 g/kg/d) was more effective against AS than the same dose of SRC over 12 weeks. Both RC and SRC increased SDF-1, SCF-1, and CXCR4 levels in the aorta of model mice compared to controls, suggesting these agents may protect the vascular endothelium through a related signaling axis. A gray relational analysis of 19 common components using UPLC-MS peak areas showed correlations (gray relational value > 0.6) with serum total cholesterol and bone marrow SDF-1 levels.
Both RC and SRC have anti-AS effects, but salt-processing does not improve this activity.
papers.title_ko: 스펙트럼-효과 관계에 기반한 ApoE-/- 마우스 죽상경화증에 대한 우슬근의 약리효과 비교 연구

summary.question: 우슬근의 생약 처리, 특히 염처리가 죽상경화증 억제 효과를 더 높이는지 평가하였다.
summary.methods: ApoE-/- 마우스 죽상경화증 모델에서 생약 우슬근과 염우슬근을 비교하고, 성분 분석과 스펙트럼-효과 관계 분석으로 관련 지표를 평가하였다.
summary.results: 생우슬근 고용량은 동일 용량의 염우슬근보다 12주 동안 죽상경화증 억제에 더 효과적이었고, 두 제형 모두 대조군보다 SDF-1, SCF-1, CXCR4를 증가시켰다.
summary.clinical_takeaway: 우슬근의 염처리가 죽상경화증 효능을 높인다고 단정하기는 어렵고, 본초 가공에 따른 효과 차이는 비임상 자료를 바탕으로 신중히 해석해야 한다.
summary.limitations: 동물실험 결과이며, 죽상경화증에 대한 임상적 유효성과 기전은 이 결과만으로 확정할 수 없다.

pico.c: 대조군 및 생우슬근과 염우슬근 간 비교

papers.title: Quantitative comparison of similarities and differences in medicinal materials used by Tibetan medicine and the three traditional medicines (6th-10th Century AD).
papers.journal: Journal of ethnobiology and ethnomedicine
papers.authors: Zhang J, Li R, Sanzhi Z, Xu L, Li Y, Zhang T et al.
papers.abstract:
Tibetan medicine has historically engaged in extensive exchanges with the three traditional medicines. These interactions peaked during the Tubo Dynasty (7th-9th century AD). Numerous scholars have acknowledged the close medical and cultural exchanges between Tibetan medicine and the three traditional medicines, but studies offering quantitative and objective comparative results are lacking.
This study quantitatively analyzes the above problems from the perspective of medicinal materials and discusses the general use of medicinal materials in Tibetan medicine, the three traditional medical systems, and the exchange of co-used medicinal materials among them. It provides a preliminary analysis of the source composition of Tibetan medicinal materials.
Firstly, Data mining: Data were extracted from 20 classical texts on Tibetan medicine, traditional Chinese medicine, Ayurveda and Arabic medicine dating from the 6th century AD to the 10th century AD. Information on medical properties, namely, medicinal taste, distribution, medicinal parts, efficacy, therapeutic use, and usage and dosage of medicinal materials, were systematically compiled to establish the datasets. Secondly, Analysis and comparison: Similarities and differences among medicinal materials used in Tibetan medicine, traditional Chinese medicine, Ayurveda, and Arabic medicine between the 6th and 10th centuries AD were analyzed using the Mann-Whitney test (a non-parametric method) and an intuitive comparison method.
The total numbers of medicinal materials in Tibetan medicine, traditional Chinese medicine, Ayurveda, and Arabic medicine were 1229, 2184, 760, and 511, respectively. The overall comparison showed that Tibetan medicine, traditional Chinese Medicine, Ayurveda, and Arabic medicine all used plants as the main source of medicinal materials, accounting for 81.2%, 84.5%, 87.3%, and 79.8%, respectively. There were significant differences in medicinal parts, therapeutic uses, and medicinal taste among them (p < 0.05). In terms of medicinal parts, traditional Chinese medicine mostly used whole herbs and rhizomes, whereas Tibetan medicine, Ayurveda, and Arabic medicine were more inclined to use renewable fruits, seeds, and leaves. Regarding treatment, although the four traditional medicines were generally used to treat digestive diseases, traditional Chinese medicine was more commonly used to treat skin diseases, whereas Ayurveda and Arabic medicine were more commonly used to treat respiratory and urogenital diseases. The comparison of co-used medicinal materials showed that Tibetan medicine had 248 kinds of co-used medicinal materials with Traditional Chinese Medicine, 140 with Ayurveda, and 128 with Arabic medicine. These co-used medicinal materials exhibited similarities and differences in terms of medicinal parts, therapeutic applications, and dose specifications.
This study found differences and similarities in the use of medicinal materials across the four traditional medicines. Significant differences in medicinal parts, therapeutic uses, and dosage forms were found, which were attributed to the combined influence of multiple factors, such as medical theory and cultural customs. In addition, a partial overlap was found between the medicinal materials used in Tibetan medicine and the three medical systems. This finding indicates that although grounded in locally available resources, Tibetan medicine has incorporated medicinal material information from traditional Chinese medicine (20.18%), Ayurveda (11.19%), and Arabic medicine (10.41%). Overall, these findings provide an empirical basis for understanding similarities and differences between Tibetan medicine and the three major medical systems and offer a novel perspective for comparative research in traditional medicine.
papers.title_ko: 티베트의학과 3대 전통의학(6~10세기)에서 사용된 약재의 유사점과 차이점에 대한 정량 비교

summary.question: 티베트의학과 중국 전통의학, 아유르베다, 아랍의학의 약재 사용은 6~10세기에 어떻게 유사하고 달랐는가?
summary.methods: 6~10세기 20개 고전 문헌의 약재 정보를 수집해 데이터셋을 구축하고, Mann-Whitney 검정과 비교 분석으로 약재 특성을 정량 비교했다.
summary.results: 네 전통의학은 모두 식물성 약재를 주로 사용했으나 약재 부위, 치료 용도, 약미에서 유의한 차이가 있었고, 티베트의학은 세 의학체계와 부분적 약재 중복을 보였다.
summary.clinical_takeaway: 전통의학 간 약재 공유와 차이는 문헌·문화·의학 이론의 영향을 함께 반영하므로, 본초 비교 연구에서 출처와 맥락을 함께 해석하는 점이 중요하다.
summary.limitations: 문헌 기반의 후향적 비교연구로 실제 임상 사용이나 인과관계를 직접 입증하지는 못한다.

pico.p: 6~10세기 티베트의학, 중국 전통의학, 아유르베다, 아랍의학의 고전 문헌
pico.i: 티베트의학의 약재 사용과 다른 전통의학과의 비교
pico.o: 약재 원천, 약재 부위, 치료 용도, 약미 및 공통 사용 약재의 차이
